current_suggestion.pitch: Your AI consumption is strong on capabilities and applications (Lex, Huberman adjacents) but thin on deep mechanistic thinking about intelligence scaling, cognition, and what AI progress actually means intellectually — Dwarkesh fills that gap with unusually rigorous long-form interviews with researchers like Dario Amodei, Francois Chollet, and historians like Patrick Collison. His questions push on first principles in a way that overlaps directly with your interest in mental models and clear thinking, not just AI hype. Format is solo long-form interview, typically 2-4 hours, with serious preparation evident in follow-up questions.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
